resources.notes: Structured, beginner-readable high-level summary of the EU AI Act — covers high-risk obligations at the right depth for this topic. Anchor.
Article 16 — Obligations of Providers of High-Risk AI Systems: documentation, testing, risk management, conformity assessment. Core obligations list.
Official European Commission AI Act Service Desk — Article 14 human oversight obligation. Authoritative.
